apply: Apply correlation analysis to real-life data sets.
Calculate the correlation coefficient using the formula.
Interpret and draw conclusions from a given correlation analysis.
analyze: Analyze the correlation between two variables and identify the direction of the relationship.
Determine the strength of the correlation between two variables.
Interpret the correlation coefficient in the context of a specific industry or scenario.
remember: Explain the concept of correlation coefficient.
Define the different types of correlation (positive, negative, and no correlation).
Distinguish between perfect, zero, and perfect negative correlation.
understand: Interpret the correlation coefficient value and its implications.
Explain the limitations of correlation analysis.
Understand the concept of correlation vs causation.

ncert_objectives: Explain the concept of correlation and its importance in economics.
Distinguish between positive, negative and no correlation.
Explain the limitations of correlation analysis.
board_exam_objectives: Determine the correlation coefficient and its value for a given data set.
Interpret the correlation coefficient and draw conclusions from it.
Apply the concept of correlation to real-life economic scenarios.
